title: Fateh (1991)
desc: Ranvir, Karan, and Salim, elite commandos trained by Major Anand, are devastated by his death. When they suspect gangster Samrat is behind it, the trio embarks on a dangerous mission.

title: Khushi
desc: A young man from a non-religious family falls in love with his rival's daughter, the child of a strict Hindu leader, sparking conflict between love, faith, and family pride.

title: Gulaal
desc: Dilip, a law student from Rajpur, is assaulted by Jadhwal's gang. Seeking revenge, he becomes entangled in the dark and dangerous world of politics.

title: Super Singh
desc: Super Singh, a carefree man living with his mother in Canada, gains superpowers and returns to Punjab to battle drug lords and corrupt politicians threatening his homeland.

title: Pardes
desc: Kishorilal chooses Ganga for his NRI son. But Ganga shares a deeper bond with Arjun, Kishorilal's foster son, leading to a conflict between duty and love.

title: Mom
desc: Devki, a biology teacher, turns to private detective DK after her stepdaughter's rapists are acquitted. Fueled by anguish, she vows revenge and sets out to deliver justice herself.

title: Holiday - A Soldier Is Never Off Duty
desc: Virat, a soldier, uncovers a terrorist plot to bomb Mumbai. He assembles his team to stop the attack and protect the city from destruction.

title: Kalyug
desc: Kunal and Renuka's happy marriage is shattered when an intimate video surfaces online. Kunal sets out to expose the culprits behind the illegal racket and seek justice.

title: Socha Na Tha
desc: Viren cant imagine having an arranged marriage. His parents want him to meet Aditi. They refuse to get married but stay friends. Will Cupid strike and change their minds?

title: Anjali
desc: Years later, Chitra learns her child, once thought dead, is alive but has a cognitive disorder. Her family then faces several struggles while raising the child.

title: Sandwich
desc: Sher Singh juggles life with his two wives, Nisha and Sweety, but when they unexpectedly meet, his troubles multiply, leading to a series of hilarious situations.

title: Happy Bhag Jayegi
desc: Happy, a lively Indian girl, elopes on her wedding day to marry Guddu. Mistakenly landing at a Pakistani politician's home, she sparks chaos, confusion, and hilarious adventures.

title: Mukkabaaz
desc: Aspiring boxer Shravan Singh clashes with Bhagwan Das Mishra, the powerful head of a boxing federation. Matters escalate when Shravan falls for Bhagwan's niece, Sunaina.

title: No Entry
desc: Kishan, a loyal husband, disapproves of his friend Prem's infidelity. But when introduced to Bobby, a prostitute, Kishan's morals are tested, leading to complications, secrets, and unexpected choices.

title: Pippa
desc: Balram Singh Mehta of the 45th Cavalry fights bravely on the eastern front during the 1971 Indo-Pak war, proving his courage, strength, and dedication to the nation.

title: Koyla
desc: Shankar, a mute servant, tricks Gauri into marrying his employer with a false photo. But Gauri falls for Shankar, fighting against odds to be with him.
